description_long: This is a modern black desk setup featuring a flat rectangular tabletop supported by four straight legs, with a set of three drawers on the right side. On the desk surface, there is a widescreen computer monitor flanked by two compact speakers, a keyboard, a pair of headphones, and a vertical computer tower positioned at the back right. A black ergonomic office chair with armrests and a five-wheel base is placed in front of the desk. The desk appears to be constructed primarily from wood or engineered wood with a matte black finish, and the drawers have simple, integrated handles. The overall design is functional and minimalistic, suitable for a workspace or home office. The setup is clean and organized, with all components neatly arranged for efficient computer-based work.
description: A modern black desk with three drawers, a computer setup, and an ergonomic office chair. The surface holds a monitor, speakers, keyboard, headphones, and a computer tower.
description_view_0: Front view showing the chair, all three drawers, and the full computer setup on the desk.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the chair's armrests, the desk's depth, and the computer monitor's profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the monitor, speakers, and the computer tower, with the chair partially visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the drawers' depth, the side of the computer tower, and the chair's side profile.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the one with the chair and drawers, with the monitor, keyboard, and other equipment arranged for direct access from this side.
